The Personal Information that we collect are used for providing and improving the Service. We will not use or share your information with anyone except as described in this Privacy Policy.
Permissions used on Android devices

WRITE EXTERNAL STORAGEthis permission is used to store all the audio files to the external memory or the sd-card of the devices. Some other files like preferences or bookmarks may be written in the external storage in order to get persistance through app installations.
READ PHONE STATEused to pause audio when receiving a phone call and to resume when the call is ended.

No use of cookiesCookies are files with small amount of data that is commonly used an anonymous unique identifier. These are sent to your browser from the website that you visit and are stored on your device internal memory.We do not use cookies in our apps however 3rd-party services may use them. Check out their privacy policies.

decoder_heading: No personally identifiable information are collected

heading_content_part: No personally identifiable information are collectedWe do not collect personally identifiable information about you. In other words, we do not collect information such as your name, address, phone number or email address. Our apps may occasionally scan a list of installed applications on user device to detect which of our apps/games are installed so we can show an appropriate house ad. The list of apps is scanned offline – we do not send or collect this information.
